_comment: GitHub merge-queue ruleset fragment (SGO-168) — a WEB-UI-ONLY template. See governance/decisions/MERGE-QUEUE-D1.md.
_comment_422_gotcha: The `merge_queue` rule CANNOT be created via the REST rulesets API — POST/PUT /repos/{o}/{r}/rulesets returns HTTP 422 for it. It MUST be enabled via Settings -> Rules -> Rulesets in the web UI. This mirrors the _comment convention in kairix .github/rulesets/main.json so that re-applying a JSON snapshot never silently drops the queue. Keep this fragment as the source-of-truth SNAPSHOT of the web-UI settings; do NOT `gh api ... --input merge-queue.json` it.
_comment_scope: Applies to PRODUCT repos only (re-test-vs-tip / not-rocket-science). Small config/data repos may keep auto-merge-no-queue — see MERGE-QUEUE-D1.md and its reconciliation with kata ADR-013.
_comment_merge_group_trigger: A product repo's fan-in 'CI gate' job MUST also report on `merge_group` events, or the queue can never go green. Add `merge_group:` to the `on:` of the repo's ci.yml (snippet in MERGE-QUEUE-D1.md).
name: main-merge-queue
